data.body:
OSS-readiness epic authoring session — evaluated an external architectural review, locked scope interactively, created the epic + full decomposition. Plan-review deferred (no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in this env).

## Phase 1 — validity of the external review
Verified all 7 findings + interface notes against the tree (branch claude/rebar-oss-readiness-su6y8l):
- F1 community files: CONFIRMED — no SECURITY.md/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/PR template (CONTRIBUTING + LICENSE exist; mirror-guard.yml enforces the read-only GitHub mirror).
- F2 server.json drift: CONFIRMED — only REBAR_ROOT/REBAR_MCP_READONLY/deprecated REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE; missing REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_LLM + REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_JIRA_SYNC.
- F3 annotations + durability: CONFIRMED — no ToolAnnotations anywhere; run_workflow uses threading.Thread(daemon=True) at _mcp_writes.py:297 yet docstring claims "resumable on crash". NB: executor already persists idempotent step records (recorder.py:32, executor.py:540/542) so the missing piece is only a resume trigger/reaper, not persistence.
- F4 API stability: CONFIRMED — no policy doc; facade returns bare dicts.
- F5 metadata: CONFIRMED — [project] lacks authors/maintainers/keywords/classifiers/urls.
- F6 supply chain: CONFIRMED — no CodeQL/Scorecard/dependabot/pip-audit. CORRECTION: release.yml uses pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish@release/v1 + id-token:write with no opt-out, so PyPI attestations ARE already emitted → "verify+document", not "add".
- F7 scale: CONFIRMED — import-export.md already documents per-event commit+lock cost; only overlaps the prior functional-remediation plan (docs/oss-comparison-and-remediation.md, HLC/identity/gc).
Critical pushback captured: PR->Gerrit bot fights the deliberate Gerrit gate; batched-commit import collides with the invariant-gated write path; Scorecard under-scores a Gerrit-gated mirror by design.

Derisk checks: mcp 1.28.1 exposes ToolAnnotations (title/readOnlyHint/destructiveHint/idempotentHint/openWorldHint) and FastMCP.tool accepts annotations= → F3 feasible. RebarError/ConcurrencyError already defined+exported (rebar._errors). pydantic is NOT a core dep (only via mcp/agents extras) → runtime models off the table for the base facade. CI matrix = py3.11/3.12, Linux+macOS. GitHub main is a ruleset-locked read-only mirror (gerrit-mirror-lock-main) → Dependabot PRs are dead-ends, Scorecard code-review signal lives on Gerrit.

## Phase 2 — scope decisions (locked with maintainer)
- Heavy items: typed public models IN; durable runner / batched-commit import / PR->Gerrit bot OUT (cheap substitutes ship regardless).
- Supply chain: alerts-only + CodeQL + pip-audit; NO Scorecard badge; attestations verify+document.
- Scale: docs-only. Onboarding: single README Quickstart, defers to `rebar --help` (no cheat sheet — would duplicate --help + 40 help/*.txt files).
- Typed models: full facade, schema-derived TypedDicts, drift-gated (static-only; keeps core dep-free of pydantic; boto3/botocore-style peer set). Exceptions: document existing RebarError/ConcurrencyError as stable.
- Metadata: Nava PBC + named maintainer (Joe Oakhart); Development Status 4-Beta; Homepage+Docs -> GitHub repo; keywords/classifiers/urls from facts.
- Contact: SECURITY primary = GitHub private vuln reporting; secondary/enforcement = hello@navapbc.com (navapbc publishes no public email + no org .github defaults — needs route-confirmation before publish).

## Phase 3 — epic
Created epic sail-shoe-smear (b02d-10bc-07ee-49e7). Passes clarity=7, check-ac, quality. Contains Context/Success Criteria/Scope(IN+OUT)/Acceptance Criteria.

## Phase 4 — decomposition (10 children, all pass structural gates; file_impact set)
- land-crown-parse (story) community health files
- read-grape-coin (story) server.json fix + CI drift-guard
- chubby-night-owl (story) MCP tool annotations
- testy-cobra-willow (task) pyproject metadata  [relates_to land-crown-parse]
- blue-pig-batch (story) supply-chain CI (CodeQL/pip-audit/alerts/attestation docs)
- barren-age-vat (story) API-stability matrix doc  [relates_to irate-draw-ulcer]
- plot-home-gob (story) scale-envelope doc
- sun-snout-ledge (story) README Quickstart
- crass-queue-cup (task) run_workflow durability docstring honesty fix
- irate-draw-ulcer (story) typed public library models (TypedDicts, drift-gated)

## State / handoff
No code changes made. Ticket writes auto-pushed (local tickets == origin/tickets). Plan-review NOT run here (anthropic_api_key:false). Next env: `rebar review-plan sail-shoe-smear` + each child; remediate non-decomposition findings; expect decomposition-only feedback on the epic. Confirm hello@navapbc.com routes before publishing community-files/metadata stories.
